%% Procedure to become a model in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start With the Right Attributes: Aim for 90%+ Looks (-> Looks) and maintain Health"] --> B["Graduate from High School First"]
    B --> C["Start as a Foot Model or Junior Model"]
    C -->|"Foot Model (-> Foot Model)"| D["Maintain and Increase Your Fame"]
    D --> E["Move Into Regular Modeling"]
    E -->|"Catalog Model (-> Catalog Model) or Runway Model (-> Runway Model)"| F["Get an Agent for Elite Gigs"]
    F -->|"Famous Model (-> Famous Model)"| G["Attend Auditions"]
    G -->|"Yes to auditions (-> Yes)"| H["Keep Your Career Stable"]
    H --> I["Max Out Your Fame"]
    I --> J["Retire Gracefully"]
